    G

    game - package game
     
    game.PowerUps - package game.PowerUps
     
    game.Projectiles - package game.Projectiles
     
    game.Screens - package game.Screens
     
    game.Ships - package game.Ships
     
    GameEntity - Class in game
    Abstract base class for all game entities.
    GameEntity(Image, double, double) - Constructor for class game.GameEntity
    Constructs a game entity with an image and position.
    GameState - Enum Class in game
     
    getBattleScreen() - Method in class game.Screens.PauseScreen
    Returns the underlying BattleScreen so ShadowAliens can restore it as the current screen when player unpauses.
    getBoundingBox() - Method in class game.GameEntity
     
    getDuration() - Method in class game.PowerUps.PowerUp
     
    getImage() - Method in class game.GameEntity
     
    getInitialX() - Method in class game.Ships.Ship
     
    getInitialY() - Method in class game.Ships.Ship
     
    getLives() - Method in class game.Lives
     
    getLives() - Method in class game.Ships.PlayerShip
     
    getScore() - Method in class game.Ships.EnemyShip
     
    getScore() - Method in class game.Ships.RegularEnemy
     
    getScore() - Method in class game.Ships.ShootingEnemy
     
    getScore() - Method in class game.Ships.StrafingEnemy
     
    getSpeed() - Method in class game.Ships.Ship
     
    getX() - Method in class game.GameEntity
     
    getY() - Method in class game.GameEntity
